comment.body:
+1 on looking forward to Alma's post. Monday open will be interesting. MOC suggests buying. Also other on X have tweeted that lot more puts were bought and market is well hedged. If shorts are covered and hedges are closed, the snapback will be very strong.  You could also call that illiquid. Lack of liquidity cuts both ways. 

Anyway probably Alma's week ahead post might bring clarity.

comment.body: In this chart that Alma gave us, two of the channels of liquidity have been broken today; we are still in the third channel which has its lower end at 5800~.
